name: oh-my-claude-code-slim
description: OMO-slim orchestration port for Claude Code: an orchestrator agent launched with `claude --agent oh-my-claude-code-slim:orchestrator`, five specialist subagents (explorer, librarian, oracle, designer, fixer) with prompt-governed lanes, orchestrator-gated phase-reminder and file-tool-nudge hooks, and ported OMO skills.
